claim_results.claim: They are the same equation read in two measurement frames. ::: :::::: :::::::::::: legend :::: leg-item ::: {.leg-dot style="background:var(--phys)"} :::

If the isomorphism is real, then substituting spiritual variables into physics equations must preserve **all mathematical relationships** --- same topology, same falloff behavior, same boundary conditions, same conservation laws.

::: \$P(\\text{actualization}) = \|\\langle \\text{faith} \| \\psi\_{\\text{promise}} \\rangle\|\^2\$ :::: ::: col-text Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen (Hebrews 11:1).
The Wheeler-DeWitt equation (\$\\hat{H}\|\\Psi\\rangle = 0\$) has no time variable at all --- time may be emergent, not fundamental.\ \ If T bifurcated cleanly, the equation would close.
A closed equation is a closed system.
And Law 3 says closed systems decay. **The equation would eat itself.**\ \ T\'s refusal to yield is the framework enforcing its own consistency.

The Master Equation can describe everything except the full nature of time, because describing the full nature of time would make the equation omniscient --- violating the uncertainty principle the equation itself contains. **It\'s Gödelian: the system is consistent because it is incomplete at exactly this point.**\ \ The veil over time is what keeps the equation open.
Wisdom traditions across cultures should converge on the claim that **knowledge reverses the damage of time** --- not metaphorically but operationally. ::: ::: iso-item 3\.
Free will requires genuine uncertainty. **Mystery preserves freedom.** ::: :::: eq-block ::: eq-name

The channel capacity equation tells you exactly how much truth a soul can receive given a specific deception-noise floor. **Spiritual warfare falls out of the math for free.** ::: ::::::::::: ::::::::::::::::::::: ::::::::::::::::: var-map ::::::::: var-map-side ::: var-map-label
